proposal1.heroHeadline: Gmail is losing $10,000 a week on slow proposal processes. Here's the fix.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, Gmail's manual proposal process wastes hours. Our system delivers complete proposals in just 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Every day, Gmail's current process bleeds valuable resources.

problems.title: Wasting Employee Time
problems.description: Every hour spent crafting proposals manually is an hour not spent improving email services. This inefficiency costs Gmail over $5,000 weekly in lost productivity.

problems.title: Delayed Client Response
problems.description: With manual proposals, response times slow down by days. This delay risks losing clients to faster-moving competitors, costing Gmail potential revenue.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Manual creation leads to branding inconsistencies. These inconsistencies damage Gmail's reputation and cost it up to $2,000 in brand repair efforts every month.

problems.title: High Error Rates
problems.description: Human errors in proposals cause misunderstandings and costly revisions. Each mistake can lead to $500 in rectification costs, amounting to thousands over time.

problems.title: Resource Drain
problems.description: The manual proposal process uses up valuable resources. This inefficiency drains Gmail of $3,000 monthly in diverted resources.

problems.title: Lost Opportunities
problems.description: Every slow proposal process results in missed opportunities. This delay could mean losing deals worth over $10,000 monthly.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system eliminates these losses with a swift and seamless solution.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours to draft. Our AI system does it in under 60 seconds, saving Gmail time and resources.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual processes risk inconsistent branding. Our system ensures every proposal aligns perfectly with Gmail's brand identity.

solutions.title: Error Reduction
solutions.description: Human errors lead to costly revisions. Our AI minimizes errors, ensuring accuracy and clarity in every proposal.

solutions.title: Real-time Tracking
solutions.description: Without tracking, proposal status is unclear. Our system includes real-time tracking, keeping Gmail informed at every step.

solutions.title: Enhanced Client Engagement
solutions.description: Manual proposals limit engagement. Our system integrates AI chatbots for interactive and engaging client experiences.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Gmail's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Gmail around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Gmail.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's Communication with Intuitive Email Solutions
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Engage with Gmail to streamline communication, reduce spam, and enhance efficiency with 15 GB storage.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently experiencing significant losses due to inefficient communication systems.

problems.title: Email Downtime
problems.description: Every hour of email downtime results in thousands of dollars in lost productivity and missed opportunities.

problems.title: High Spam Volume
problems.description: Excessive spam clutters inboxes, leading to important messages being overlooked and potential revenue losses.

problems.title: Limited Storage
problems.description: Insufficient storage capacity leads to frequent purging of emails, causing loss of crucial historical data.

problems.title: Mobile Access Issues
problems.description: Difficulty accessing emails on mobile devices decreases operational efficiency and affects employee responsiveness.

problems.title: Security Threats
problems.description: Security vulnerabilities in current systems expose sensitive data, potentially costing millions in data breach settlements.

problems.title: Poor User Interface
problems.description: A non-intuitive interface causes user frustration and reduces overall productivity, impacting company performance.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Gmail offers targeted solutions to address each of these challenges effectively.

solutions.title: Gmail Enterprise
solutions.description: Minimize downtime with reliable, high-performance email hosting. Enhance productivity and communication.

solutions.title: Advanced Spam Filtering
solutions.description: Reduce spam by up to 99.9% with our advanced filtering. Ensure important messages are prioritized.

solutions.title: Mobile Access
solutions.description: Access emails seamlessly on any device. Increase flexibility and response times for a mobile workforce.

solutions.title: Enhanced Security
solutions.description: Protect sensitive information with robust security protocols. Avoid costly data breaches and maintain trust.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Gmail stands out with its intuitive and efficient email solutions.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Reliability
whyUsCards.description: Our services are trusted by millions worldwide, ensuring consistent performance.

whyUsCards.title: Top-notch Security
whyUsCards.description: We prioritize security with industry-leading measures to protect your data.

whyUsCards.title: Scalable Solutions
whyUsCards.description: Tailor our services to fit your growing needs and ensure seamless scalability.

whyUsCards.title: User-Friendly Interface
whyUsCards.description: An intuitive design makes Gmail easy to use, boosting user satisfaction and productivity.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet the team that will drive your success.

team.name: there
team.bio: Leading strategy and client relationships with passion and expertise. Committed to transforming communication at Acme Corp.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery and Planning
process.description: Understanding your needs and mapping out a tailored solution.

process.title: Implementation
process.description: Setting up and customizing Gmail solutions to fit your business.

process.title: Testing and Training
process.description: Ensuring everything works smoothly and training your team.

process.title: Go Live and Support
process.description: Launching your new email system and providing ongoing support.

proposal2.pricingIntro: Explore our investment options to find the best fit for Acme Corp.

pricing.name: Basic Plan
pricing.description: Ideal for small teams looking to upgrade their email capabilities.

pricing.description: Our recommended package for medium to large businesses aiming for growth.

proposal2.ctaDescription: Let's discuss how Gmail can transform your business. No obligation, just a friendly chat.
